evidence.description: From mid-1988 until Khomeini's death, Ahmad Khomeini was one of three effective co-rulers alongside Rafsanjani and Khamenei. Rafsanjani's memoirs contain multiple references to Ahmad's subsequent dissatisfaction at being sidelined.

editorial_notes: Coordinated during 1988-1989; relationship deteriorated after Khomeini's death as Rafsanjani consolidated power.
